mano_cua.result_summary: Z轴刻度标签顺序颠倒。使用 Demo Vote 数据集（25k行），将 Education 字段映射到 Z 轴。Scatter 和 Column 3D 图表中，Z 轴顶部显示最小值 0，底部显示最大值 100，与预期升序（底部小值→顶部大值）相反。刻度标签与实际数据位置一致但整体方向倒置。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Z-axis tick labels are inverted. Top shows 0 (minimum), bottom shows 100 (maximum). Expected: bottom=0, top=100. Confirmed in both Scatter and Column 3D chart types with Education field mapped to Z-axis.
